tasks.title: Define live runtime handle schema
tasks.goal: Define bounded runtime handle evidence for fixture, local process, and MCP-backed Narada-native sessions.
tasks.context: Live carrier liveness is embodiment evidence, not task or effect authority.
required_work: Add runtime handle kinds for local_process, mcp_session, and fixture.
Record stable handle id, process or session presence, started_at, heartbeat_due_at, reachability summary, and raw transcript/secret flags false.
Add schema tests for fixture, live process, MCP session, and missing runtime handles.
non_goals: Do not infer task authority from runtime liveness.
Do not store raw transcripts, prompts, provider outputs, or secret values.
Do not require a permanently running daemon for unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime handle schema covers fixture, local process, MCP session, and missing handle states.
Handle evidence is bounded and has raw transcript/secret flags false.
Tests prove runtime liveness is not task or effect authority.

tasks.title: Implement live start evidence
tasks.goal: Record live session start evidence with reachability posture and blocked states.
tasks.context: Session start should report configured reachability without performing provider calls or Narada mutations.
required_work: Record runtime handle and configured to-data/to-intelligence reachability probes.
Emit blocked posture for missing registration, missing consent, stale or revoked grant, and missing required local executable.
Add tests covering fixture-only, provider-configured, blocked-missing-capability, and blocked-runtime-unavailable start.
non_goals: Do not perform live provider calls during start evidence.
Do not claim, report, review, close, publish, or mutate inbox/outbox state.
acceptance_criteria: Start evidence records bounded runtime and reachability posture.
Blocked start states are explicit and reconstructable.
Tests prove no provider calls or Narada mutations occur.

tasks.title: Implement heartbeat evidence
tasks.goal: Emit bounded heartbeat evidence for live Narada-native sessions.
tasks.context: Heartbeat should show runtime and adapter health without capturing raw transcripts or provider output.
required_work: Report runtime alive, degraded, stale, or missing posture.
Include latest bounded work packet summary, latest handoff ref, to-data reachability, and provider readiness posture.
Add tests proving no raw transcript, raw provider output, prompt, or secret values are recorded.
non_goals: Do not make heartbeat freshness lifecycle truth.
Do not store raw conversation or provider text.
acceptance_criteria: Heartbeat evidence distinguishes alive, degraded, stale, and missing states.
Heartbeat includes bounded work, handoff, to-data, and provider summaries.
Tests prove raw transcript, provider output, prompt, and secret values are absent.

tasks.title: Implement interrupt close and failure semantics
tasks.goal: Implement bounded lifecycle evidence for interrupt, close, and failure outcomes.
tasks.context: Runtime control evidence must avoid killing unrelated processes or implying authority transfer.
required_work: Record interrupt as requested, acknowledged, refused, or unsupported.
Record close as stopped, unknown, or stale with authority_transfer=false.
Record failure reason class, terminal flag, bounded diagnostics, and latest evidence refs.
Add tests for clean close, stale close, interrupted, failed nonterminal, and failed terminal states.
non_goals: Do not close tasks or execute external effects.
Do not store raw stderr/stdout transcripts.
acceptance_criteria: Interrupt, close, and failure evidence are bounded and reconstructable.
Tests cover clean, stale, interrupted, nonterminal failure, and terminal failure states.

tasks.title: Expand supervisor doctor states
tasks.goal: Expand Narada-native doctor output for fixture, provider, blocked, running, degraded, failed, interrupted, and stopped states.
tasks.context: Operators need compact state visibility without repair mutation or credential exposure.
required_work: Add doctor states for fixture_only, provider_configured, blocked, running, degraded, failed, interrupted, and stopped.
Report residual blockers and next diagnostic command, not automatic repair mutation.
Add doctor tests covering every state.
non_goals: Do not expose raw provider config or credential values.
Do not make doctor output an authority locus.
Do not perform repair actions from doctor.
acceptance_criteria: Doctor output distinguishes all required states.
Doctor reports blockers and diagnostics without repair mutation.
Tests prove output is bounded and redacted.

tasks.title: Expand reconstruction from durable evidence
tasks.goal: Reconstruct live session posture from bounded session JSON evidence.
tasks.context: Narada-native live posture should be reconstructable without direct SQLite or secret-store inspection.
required_work: Reconstruct launch, supervisor events, adapter evidence, handoff, interrupt, closeout, and failure evidence from session JSON refs.
Preserve event ordering and latest posture summary.
Add tests proving reconstruction works without direct SQLite or secret-store inspection.
non_goals: Do not treat reconstruction as canonical task truth.
Do not require live network calls.
Do not inspect raw credential stores.
acceptance_criteria: Live session reconstruction reads bounded durable JSON evidence.
Event ordering and latest posture are available.
Tests prove no direct SQLite or secret-store inspection is required.
